CreateEvent:yasyf/cc-ask.summary: a persistent alternative to AskUserQuestion with richer context and remote approvals from web or phone

CreateEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: a Go toolkit of detached FUSE-T mount-holder and mount-lifecycle primitives

PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: shipped the turnkey 'set up captain hook' session reviewer and stopped committed settings double-firing

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-factory.summary: scaffolded a software factory for Claude Code: agents that plan, build, review, and ship

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-notes.summary: added a projects/sprints/validation-criteria planning layer and shipped the hooks as a capt-hook pack

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-orchestrate.summary: rewrote it as a pure-Go CLI on cc-interact, driving agent fleets across cmux/superset/tmux backends

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-pushback.summary: rebuilt the view-samples dashboard around a faceted sidebar with code-evidence and language filters

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-review.summary: added per-line focus bubbles and gradient dimming so the reviewer is guided within each file, not just across

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-skills.summary: added the cli-demo skill for animated SVG CLI demos rendered with evp

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-transcript.summary: modeled Claude Code's mid-turn model-fallback block and added an OtherBlock catch-all so the parser degrades

PushEvent:yasyf/dailies.summary: unified integration credentials into a Mongo store with a setup wizard, and seeded the weekly profile refresh

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: stood up the detached mount-holder and FUSE mount-lifecycle primitives, cutting v0.1.0

captain-hook@v3.3.1.summary: stopped a repo with committed settings from double-firing its hooks at init

cc-notes@v0.4.0.summary: added a projects/sprints/validation-criteria planning layer and shipped the hooks as a capt-hook pack

cc-orchestrate@v0.2.1.summary: fixed a tailer data race by snapshotting the poll interval instead of reading the mutable global

cc-pool@v0.28.1.summary: cut the FUSE-T getattr/merge CPU storm under load and stopped false needs-login on 401 streaks

cc-pushback@v0.3.0.summary: migrated onto the capt-hook 2.0 and cc-transcript 2.0 API

slop-cop@v0.1.14.summary: added --lines to report only violations within a touched range, built for agents linting edits

spawnllm@v0.1.3.summary: unwraps the single-result envelope in structured JSON output
